"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\regex_tokenizer_test.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\regex_tokenizer_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\regex_tokenizer_test.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\regex_tokenizer_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\regex_tokenizer_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib\libregex_tokenizer_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\regex_tokenizer_test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
